name: Digital Laser Measure
shortDescription: Handheld laser distance meter for signage and coverage-plan measurement.
longDescription: A handheld laser measure speeds up site surveys for signage placement, hydrant spacing and extinguisher coverage planning, replacing a tape measure across long or obstructed spans. Stores recent readings and calculates area/volume directly on device.

images.alt: Digital Laser Measure supplied by Expert Safety Solutions, Vadodara
